title: TrainingEvent
description: A CCHR training, workshop, or community-outreach event — the Commission's education mission (know-your-rights workshops, the Stop Sexual Harassment Act training, TGNC/Fair Chance campaigns, Community Relations Bureau events). NET-NEW / reference: these are published only as HTML pages on nyc.gov/site/cchr/community/events-workshops.page, /law/sexual-harassment-training.page, and /community/commission-workshops.page — there is NO events API and NO Open Data twin. This schema turns outreach into a structured, referenceable resource.

eventId.description: Stable identifier / slug for the event or workshop.

title.description: Name of the training, workshop, or event.

protectedClasses.description: Protected classes the session focuses on, if topical.

audience.description: Intended audience (e.g. employers, tenants, community members).

onlineTraining.description: Whether an on-demand online training is available (e.g. the Stop Sexual Harassment Act training).

startDateTime.description: Scheduled start, for a dated event.

registrationUrl.description: Where to register or learn more.

languages.description: Languages the session is offered in.
